digest.title: What xAI's Grok build CLI sends to xAI: A wire-level analysis
Claude Code sends 33k tokens before reading the prompt; OpenCode sends 7k
Apple’s failed self-driving car program left a legacy of powerful AI chips
digest.tldr: Apple's self-driving car program never really got off the ground, but it may have been what made the company's chips the powerful AI performers they are.  Early in the development of the self-driving platform, Apple…
